items.name: Infernal Blade - Emerald
items.description: Infused with the essence of ancient forests, this sword channels the raw power of nature. Its sleek, emerald blade, gleaming with mystical energy, strikes a balance between elegance and ferocity. Each swing conjures a tempest of green inferno, enveloping adversaries in a swirling vortex of primal might. A symbol of untamed prowess, this blade leaves a trail of devastation in its wake, marking the dominion of its wielder.
